title: aster alpinus subsp. alpinus
intro: Aster alpinus subsp. alpinus, also known as alpine aster, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Aster alpinus subsp. alpinus can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
